# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2018-05-01/subscriptionDeploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

metadata:
  description: >
    Assigns Contributor role to an existing Service Principal at subscription level
    for CI/CD pipeline deployments. 
    WARNING - This grants broad permissions. Consider scoping to resource groups 
    and using custom roles with minimum required permissions in production.
    Deploy with: az deployment sub create --location <region> --template-file <this-file>

parameters:
  servicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: >
        The Object ID (not Application/Client ID) of the Service Principal.
        Find via: az ad sp show --id <appId> --query id -o tsv
    minLength: 36
    maxLength: 36

  roleAssignmentGuid:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[newGuid()]"
    metadata:
      description: >
        A unique GUID for the role assignment resource name.
        Defaults to a new GUID. Provide a fixed value for idempotent deployments.

  roleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c
    allowedValues:
      - b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c  # Contributor
      - acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7  # Reader
    metadata:
      description: >
        The Role Definition ID to assign.
        Default is Contributor (b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c).
        Consider using Reader or a custom role for least privilege.

  deploymentDescription:
    type: string
    defaultValue: CI/CD Pipeline Service Principal - Contributor Role Assignment
    metadata:
      description: Description tag for the role assignment purpose.

variables:
  contributorRoleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"
  roleAssignmentName: "[parameters('roleAssignmentGuid')]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]"
      principalId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[parameters('deploymentDescription')]"

outputs:
  roleAssignmentId:
    type: string
    value: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName'))]"
  roleAssignmentName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]"
  assignedRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]"
  assignedPrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]"
  securityReminder:
    type: string
    value: >
      REMINDER - This Service Principal has Contributor access at subscription scope.
      Regularly review this assignment and consider scoping down to resource groups
      or using a custom role with only the permissions your pipeline requires.
